items.title: 甲骨文财报将揭示其高昂人工智能押注是否开始见效
items.summary: 甲骨文公司与OpenAI达成3000亿美元的交易，确立了其在人工智能云计算领域的重要地位，与亚马逊、谷歌和微软并驾齐驱。
items.title_en: Oracle earnings will show whether its expensive AI bet is starting to pay off
items.summary_en: Oracle's $300 billion deal with OpenAI established it as a major player in AI cloud computing alongside Amazon, Google and Microsoft.

items.title: 凯文·曼迪亚在2022年将其网络安全公司卖给了谷歌。他有着一笔新鲜的190亿美元用于新项目
items.summary: 麦迪安特(Mandiant)创始人凯文·曼迪亚(Kevin Mandia)在将其前公司卖给谷歌(Google)后仍然专注于网络安全，但现在他转向了人工智能(AI)。
items.title_en: Kevin Mandia sold his cybersecurity company to Google in 2022. He has a fresh $190 million for a new venture
items.summary_en: Mandiant founder Kevin Mandia is staying in cybersecurity after selling his prior company to Google, but now he's focused on AI.

items.title: Nvidia计划为企业推出开源AI代理平台“NemoClaw”。

items.summary_en: Nvidia is planning to lean into the agentic AI craze and launch an open-source platform for AI agents called 'NemoClaw,' according to a report.

items.title: Anthropic被美国国防部选为人工智能合作伙伴，如今却被禁用，专家们开始担忧。

items.title_en: Anthropic was the Pentagon's choice for AI. Now it's banned and experts are worried
items.summary_en: Anthropic's partnerships with Amazon and Palantir helped it make inroads into the DOD, and its blacklisting is concerning to many industry experts.

items.title: OpenAI将收购安全性初创公司Promptfoo以更好地保护AI代理

items.title_en: OpenAI to buy cybersecurity startup Promptfoo to better safeguard AI agents
items.summary_en: Promptfoo's team will join Sam Altman-led OpenAI, and its technology will be integrated into the Frontier platform for AI agents.

items.summary_en: Microsoft 365 E7 comes with Copilot, as well as identity, management and security features that might make more businesses adopt AI.

items.title_en: Oil price correction gives Lufthansa shares lift-off
items.summary_en: Lufthansa shares jumped 7% on Tuesday, continuing to outperform rival airlines since the outbreak of war in Iran.

items.title: 伊朗战争：赫格塞特说星期二将是我们最激烈的袭击日。
items.summary: 美国前总统唐纳德·特朗普周一预测，针对伊朗的战争将很快结束，并警告伊朗不要停止石油输出。
items.title_en: Iran war: Hegseth says Tuesday 'will be our most intense day of strikes'
items.summary_en: President Donald Trump on Monday had predicted that the war against Iran would be over "very soon," and warned that country against withholding oil afterward.

items.title: 伊朗战争和能源价格上涨威胁半导体需求
items.summary: 一场美国以色列与伊朗的长期战争可能导致芯片制造关键材料短缺和能源成本上涨，从而损害半导体需求。
items.title_en: How the Iran war and rising energy prices are threatening semiconductor demand
items.summary_en: A prolonged U.S.-Israel war against Iran could lead to shortages of key chipmaking materials and higher energy costs which could hurt semiconductor demand.

items.title: 油价飙升至100美元，人们开始担心会出现1970年代式的通货膨胀加失业。这种威胁有多大?
items.summary: 高通胀和缓慢增长构成了双重威胁，降息和政府开支等措施只会加剧通胀。
items.title_en: Fears of 1970s-style stagflation arise with oil spike to $100. How big a threat is it?
items.summary_en: High inflation and slow growth present a double threat, as measures like interest rate cuts and government spending only aggravate inflation.

items.summary_en: Barclays says the chasm between winning and losing stocks in 2022 when Russia invaded Ukraine was huge. Here are their style picks.

items.title: 10年期国债收益率保持不变，随着特朗普对霍尔木兹海峡警告伊朗，石油价格暴跌。
items.summary: 10年期国债收益率保持不变，随着特朗普警告伊朗若试图阻止霍尔木兹海峡运输，石油价格大幅下跌。
items.title_en: 10-year Treasury yield is little changed as oil tumbles after Trump warns Iran over Hormuz flows
items.summary_en: The 10-year Treasury yield was flat as oil prices tumbled after Trump warned that Iran would be hit harder if it tried to halt Strait of Hormuz shipments.

items.title: 石油价格在周一大幅上涨之后徘徊在每桶90美元左右的波动交易中。
items.summary: 石油价格暴跌，随着特朗普警告称，如果伊朗试图阻止霍尔木兹海峡石油流通，伊朗将遭受“二十倍的打击”。
items.title_en: Oil prices hover around $90 a barrel in volatile trading following Monday's spike
items.summary_en: Oil prices plunged after Trump warned that Tehran would be hit "twenty times harder" if it attempted to halt oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: 飙升的油价可能会抵消特朗普的“大美丽法案”的好处
items.summary: 华尔街的估计显示，如果石油价格持续高涨，消费者可能会因新税法而损失的钱多于所得。
items.title_en: Surging oil prices could wipe out benefits from Trump’s ‘big beautiful bill’
items.summary_en: Estimates from Wall Street project that if oil prices stay elevated for too long, consumers will lose as much as they gain from the new tax law.

items.title: 伊朗为对邻国的袭击辩护。他们说，一个“巨大的信任缺口”将持续数十年。
items.summary: 伊朗对其针对邻国的袭击进行了辩护，但邻国表示，这些袭击已经损害了长期的信任。
items.title_en: Iran defends strikes on Gulf neighbors. They say a 'huge trust gap' will last for decades
items.summary_en: Iran has defended its strikes against its Gulf countries but its neighbors say attacks have damaged trust for a long time.

items.title: 沙特阿拉伯石油公司承诺，如果霍尔木兹海峡重新开放，石油生产将在几天内恢复到正常水平。
items.summary: 阿拉姆科CEO警告称，如果霍尔木兹海峡的实际关闭持续一段时间，油价市场将面临“灾难性的后果”。他对美国海军护送运油船的前景不抱乐观态度。
items.title_en: Saudi Aramco promises full production can be restored within days if Strait of Hormuz is reopened
items.summary_en: Aramco’s CEO warns of “catastrophic consequences” for the oil market if the effective closure of the Straits Of Hormuz were to remain for an extended period. He was unenthusiastic about prospects for the U.S. Navy escorting tankers in transit.

items.title: 美国银行策略师警告：伊朗的“烧尽一切”战略存在风险
items.summary: 波士顿银行的股权衍生品策略师，尼丁·萨克森（Nitin Saksena）带领，认为还不能高兴。
items.title_en: Beware the risk of a scorched-earth strategy from Iran, say Bank of America strategists
items.summary_en: Bank of America’s equity-derivatives strategists, led by Nitin Saksena, say it’s too early to celebrate.

items.title: 中国的提醒、美国豁免和伊朗紧张关系测试印度的经济平衡之举
items.summary: 印度试图保留其长期中立的外交政策，因为伊朗周边的紧张局势威胁到其石油供应，并使新德里面临来自华盛顿和北京的压力。

items.summary_en: India is trying to preserve its long-standing neutral foreign policy as escalating tensions around Iran threaten its oil supply and expose New Delhi to pressure from both Washington and Beijing.
